title: KHAWZAWLAH NCORD MEETING NEI
content:
747/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 29thMay, 2026:Vawiin khan Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana, NCORD Chairman ni bawk  kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah May thla atan Khawzawl DistrictNarco Co-Ordination Centre (NCORD) meeting neih a ni a. NCORD meeting hmasaa thurel bawhzuinate thlir let niin, hma lak zel dan tur sawiho a ni.

Khawzawl SP Pu F. Lalbiakzauva, NCORD Member Convener ni bawk chuan drugs man dan report pein, NCORD meeting hnuhnung ber hnu khan Heroin gram 170, Rs. 34,60,000 man hu man a nih thu a tarlang a. Kumin chhung hian case 14 ziahluh tawh niin, mi 25 man an ni tawh a. Heroin gram 521, Rs. 1,03,08,000 man hu leh Methemphetamine kg 13.87, Rs. 11,09,60,000 man hu man tawh a nih thu a tarlang bawk.

June thla chhung hian Biate leh Sialhawkahte awareness campaign nei tura ruahmnna siam a ni a. Khawzawl district-a Drug Free Village-a thlan Tlangmawi khuaah pawh joint inspection leh verification SDO Pu Chandrakant Bagoria hovin neih a ni tawh a. Anti-Tobacco Squad hmalakna hrang hrangte ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Khawzawl district hi Mizoram chhunga NCORD dedicated helpline number nei awm chhun a ni a, a number chu 8119080266 niin, hemi number-ah hian mipuite chu ruihhlo kaihnawih thil reng reng report tura ngen an ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL HIGHER SECONDARY SCHOOL-AH WORLD NO TOBACCO DAY PUALIN HUN HMAN A NI
content:
746/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 29thMay, 2026:Vawiin khan Khawzawl Higher Secondary School-ah World No Tobacco Day pualin hun hman a ni a. Khawzawl SP Pu F. Lalbiakzauva chu khuallian a ni a, District Programme Manager Pu Laldinsanga chuan hun a kaihruai.

Vawiin hunah hian khuallian Pu F. Lalbiakzauva chuan zirlaite hnenah zuk leh hmuam hlauhawmzia leh nghawng tha lo a neihte a sawi a. Kumin theme ‘Unmasking the appeal – countering tobacco and nicotine addiction’ hian vaihlo leh a kaihnawih itawm taka lang chu a hlauhawmzia leh na tak tuar chunga thihna a thlen theih hailan tumna a nih thu a sawi a. WHO-in a chhinchhiah danah chuan kum tin zuk leh hmuam avangin mi 8 million thi an awm thu a tarlang a. Zuk leh hmuam hi drugs hman sualna kailawn (gateway to drugs) a nih thu sawiin, zirlaite chu fihlim tlat turin a chah a ni.

Khawzawl SDPO Pu Jeremia Vanlalhmachhuana hnen atangin Anti-Tobacco Squad hmalaknate report ngaihthlak a ni a. Health Supervisor Pi F. Lalrokungi’n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

World No Tobacco Day hi May 31 a ni a, remchan zawkna avangin vawiinah hun hman a ni a, DIPRO Pi Lalchungnungi Lakher leh Circle Officer Pu Lalrinsiama te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Union Minister of State Pu Tokhan Sahu chuan Champhai hmun hrang hrang a tlawh
content:
745/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 29th May 2026: Union Minister of State for Housing & Urban Affairs, Govt. of India Pu Tokhan Sahu chuan vawiin khan Champhai hmun hrang hrang a tlawh.

Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U) hnuaia Champhai Zote khuaa insak tanpuina dawngtu te insak a hmunah a en a, insak tanpuina sum an dawn hmanga in tha tak tak an din thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, in neitute pawhin mahni puala in nei lo te'n in tha tak an neih theihna tura Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi-a hmalakna ah lawmthu an sawi ve bawk. Zote a tlawh zawh hian Champhai District Hospital a tlawh leh nghal a, District Medical Superintendent Dr. Zatluanga leh Staff dang ten an lo dawngsawng a, Hospital chhung hmun hrang hrang fang a fang kual a, hospital kalphung te hnathawkte hian an hrilhfiah nghal a ni.

Kahrawt Anganwadi pawh tlawhin thawktute leh naupang nu leh pa ten an lo dawngsawng a, Minister hian nitin wadi an kal em tih leh harsatna an neih te a zawt a, Anganwadi thawktute pawhin Anganwadi in an mamawh te an lo thlen ve bawk. Hemi hnu hian Sakti Sada , Champhai Vengthlang ami chu a tlawh leh a, he hmun hi hmeichhia pasal then avanga awmna nei lote awmna a nih bakah hmeichhia hleilenna tuar te enkawlna hmun a ni a, enkawl mek hmeichhiate hian an fate an awmpui ve bawk a ni. Minister Pu Tokhan Sahu-a chuan hna an thawh dan leh Shakti Sadan an kalpui dan tlangpui a zawt a, thawktute hian he hmuna awm te hi harsatna khirh tak tawk hmeichhiate an nih thin thu leh kum 3 chhung an awm theih thu te, thla 3 atanga thla 6 chhung chauh awm te an awm thu an lo hrilh a, tanpuina pawisa fai a hlan bawk.

Union Minister hian Keilungliah khuah a tlawh nghal a, he hmunah hian PHE Department te chuan lo hmuakin Keilungliah khuah a nih theihna tura hmalakna te, hmalakna tur hmachhawp la awm mek te an lo hrilhfiah a ni. Keilungliah Khuah a tlawh hnu hian Circuit House ah let lehin vawiin tlai khan Aizawl panin a let leh a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER CHAIRS ZMC & H GOVERNING BODY MEETING
content:
122/2026-2027

Aizawl, 29 May 2026:The Governing Body meeting of Zoram Medical College & Hospital (ZMC & H) was held today at the CM Conference Hall under the chairmanship of Chief Minister Mr. Lalduhoma.

The meeting was attended by Dr. Vanlalthlana, Minister for School Education, Smt. Lalrinpuii, Minister for Health & Family Welfare, Ms. Baryl Vanneihsangi, MLA, along with other members of the Governing Body.

During the meeting, members discussed the improvement of the Department of Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation in medical colleges. At present, only one doctor is available in the department, who is also handling both clinical and faculty responsibilities. The Governing Body stressed the need for immediate strengthening of the department.

The meeting also reviewed the ongoing construction of the Critical Care Block, which is being built through CSR funding. Necessary equipment for the block is also expected to be procured shortly. Discussions were held on ensuring the effective utilization of the facility once operational.

Various proposals aimed at strengthening and upgrading ZMC & H, already submitted into MPLAN, were also reviewed. The Governing Body prepared a priority list for implementation of the projects, as it would not be feasible to undertake all projects simultaneously.

Over the past two years, 30 new cabins and 13 new ICU units have been added to ZMC & H. In addition, a large number of previously non-functional hospital beds have been repaired and made functional again. With a total capacity of 517 beds, ZMC & H has now become the largest hospital in Mizoram.

In October 2024, 10 new Post Graduate seats were introduced, and nine students are currently pursuing their studies. Recently, the third batch of MBBS students also successfully completed their course.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER HOVIN ZMC & H GOVERNING BODY THUKHAWM
content:
744/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th May 2026:Vawiin khan CM Conference Hall-ah Zoram Medical College & Hospital Governing Body te chu an chairman Pu Lalduhoma, Chief Minister hovin an thukhawm. Dr. Vanlalthlana, Education Minister, Pi Lalrinpuii, Health Minister, Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi, bialtu MLA leh member dangte an tel.

Meeting-ah hian Department of Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation, Medical College-a Department awm ngei ngei tura National Medical Commission-in a tihah doctor pakhat chauh a awm mek a. Ani hian clinical leh faculty mawhphurhna a la dun si a. Hei hi a ranglama siam fel ni se, an ti.

Critical Care Block hi CSR atanga sak mek a ni a. Equipments pawh an nei nghal dawn a. He Critical Care block hi a hman theih huna tangkai taka hman dan tur sawiho a ni.

ZMC & H tihchangtlunna tur proposal, MPLAN lama dahluh tawhte thlirhona neih nghal a ni a. Vawiina Governing Body hian heng project-te a ngaihpawimawh hmasak dan indawt (priority list) a siam bawk a ni. Project te hi a ruala thawh nghal vek theih a nih loh thulhah thawh hmasak dan tur indawt hi siam a ni thin.

Kum hnih liam ta chhungin ZMC & H ah hian Cabin thar 30 leh ICU thar 13 te siam a ni tawh a. ICU bik hi chu a hlui han thawm thatte pawh an awm a. Khum (Hospital bed) hman theih loh (non functional) tam tham tak siam that (functional) an ni tawh bawk a. Tunah hian khum 517 neiin Mizorama Hospital lian ber a ni tawh a ni.

October 2024 khan Post Graduate zirna seat 10 hawn thar a ni a, mi pakuain an zir mek a. Tun hnai mai khan MBBS batch pathumnate an zir chhuah fel bawk.

title: LAWNGTLAI DEO HOLDS MEETING WITH CHURCH LEADERS ON SIR 2026
content:
121/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 29th May 2026:As part of the ongoing preparations for the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026, Lawngtlai District Election Officer (DEO) Shri Donny Lalruatsanga today held a meeting with Church leaders at his Office Chamber.

In his address, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga expressed gratitude to the Church leaders for attending the meeting and briefed them on the overall objectives and progress of SIR 2026 in Lawngtlai District. He stated that a fresh Electoral Roll will be prepared under SIR 2026 and emphasized that it is extremely important to ensure that only genuine Indian citizens are included in the Electoral Roll.

The DEO said that while Election Officials are putting in their best efforts, the support and cooperation of NGOs and Churches would be highly valuable in successfully carrying out the revision process. He appealed to the Church leaders to extend their cooperation, especially in ensuring that non-genuine citizens are not wrongly included in the Electoral Roll.

He also pointed out that a large number of migrants are currently residing in Lawngtlai District, making it necessary to exercise extra caution during the revision process. In this regard, he urged Churches to remain vigilant, including while issuing recommendation or identification letters. The DEO further appealed to all Church leaders to contribute their best efforts towards maintaining a clean and error-free Electoral Roll.

The Church leaders thanked the District Election Officer for recognizing the important role of Churches in the process. They expressed their support for conducting the Special Intensive Revision 2026 in a fair and proper manner and assured that Churches would extend full cooperation in every possible way.The Church representatives also affirmed their commitment to ensuring that only genuine Indian citizens are included in the Electoral Roll and pledged continued cooperation with the District Election Office through various means.

Today’s meeting was attended by Election Officials, representatives of the MJA Lawngtlai, and representatives from various Churches within Lawngtlai District. The programme concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri Donny Lalruatsanga.

Attachment

title: SIR 2026 CHUNGCHANGAH LAWNGTLAI DEO - IN KOHHRAN HRUAITUTE KAWM
content:
743/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 29th May 2026:Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 kalpui tur atana inbuatsaihna kal zelah vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Election Officer Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a Office Chamber-ah Kohhran hruaitute a kawm.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin, SIR 2026 nihphung tlangpui leh Lawngtlai District - a kalpui tura chak taka hmalak mek zel a nih thu a sawi a. SIR 2026 ah Electoral Roll-thar hlak siam a nih tur thu tarlangin, E/Roll-a hming chuangte India khua leh tui dik tak an nih a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti. Election Officials-  ten theihtawp an chhuahnaah NGOs leh Kohhran te puihbawmna a tangkai dawn hle tih sawiin,  Kohhran hruaitute thawhpuiah a sawm a. A bik takin India khua leh tui dik tak ni lo te  E/Roll- a an  chuan palh a pawi thei dawn hle tiin, hemi kawngah hian Kohhran ten theihtawp chhuaha lo fimkhurpui turin a sawm a ni. Lawngtlai District - ah ral tlan tam tak an awm mek tih sawiin, hei vang hian fimkhur taka hmalak a ngai dawn tih sawiin, Kohhran ten hriatpuia lehkha an pekchhuah kawngah pawh fimkhur thar turin a ngen  a. District Election Officer chuan Electoral Roll- felfai leh thianghlim nei tura theihtawp chhuahpui turin Kohhran hruaitute a sawm nghal a ni.

Kohhran hruaitute chuan District Election Officer - in Kohhran te a ngaihpawimawhna kawngah lawmthu an sawi a. Special Intensive Revision 2026 chu tha leh felfai taka kalpui tha an tih thu tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian Kohhran chuan an theihna kawng kawngah theihtawp an chhuahpui tur thu an tarlang a.  Kohhran hruaitute chuan India khua leh tui dik tak chauh E/Roll- a an chuan theihna tura an thawh tur thu leh kawng hrang hranga DIstrict Election Office an thawhpui tlat tur thu an tarlang bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Election Officials- te, MJA Lawngtlai aiawh leh Lawngtlai District - chhunga Kohhran hrang hrang aiawhte an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah Sawrkar laipui leh State sawrkar scheme Rooftop Solar kan hman theihna turah mipuite zirtirna pek a ni.
content:
742/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 28th  May of 2026 :Nimin khan I&PR Conference Hall, Mamit-ah PM Surya Ghar : Muft Bijli Yojana hmalakna kal zelah, Month of Solar 2026 Celebration & Awareness Campaign hun hman niin mipuite hnenah sawrkar laipui leh state sawrkar tangkawpa hmalakna Rooftop ṭangkai taka kan hman zel theih nan inzirtirna hun hman a ni.

Pu Jacob Lalrinfela, Executive Enginner Power & Electricity Department, Resource Person chuan presentation pein, zawhna te a chhang nghal a ni.

He hunah hian Rooftop Solar hmang mekte hnen aṭangin a hlawkna leh a ṭhatnate ngaihthlak a nih bakah, zawhna leh chhanna hunte hman a ni a.

PM Surya Ghar : Muft Bijli Yojana,  Moth of Solar 2026 Celebration behchhan hian Mamit Power Division hnuaia Sub-Division hrang hrangah mipui zirtirna Banner-te tar niin Scheme thehdarhna hun hi hman a ni bawk.

Rooftop Solar hi Portal pahnih State leh National a awm a. Hrechiang duh tan heng a hnuaia Phone No. leh Link tarlanah te hian Office hun chhunga zawhfiah/en theih reng a ni e: 8787688235/8729982857/7005640548

https:/pmsuryaghar.mizoram. gov.in

https:/pmsuryaghar.gov.in
